text.title: claude-messages-api Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed when claude-messages-api is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (`note`).

antipattern.description: 400 on the second multi-turn call whenever a tool was used in turn 1.
antipattern.reason: Assistant turn appended only `.text`, dropping `tool_use` blocks from `response.content`.
antipattern.note: Fix: Append the full `response.content` list as the assistant turn; tool_use blocks must survive.

antipattern.description: Streamed tool call output arrives as broken JSON.
antipattern.reason: Caller parses `input_json_delta` events inline instead of accumulating until `content_block_stop`.
antipattern.note: Fix: Buffer all `input_json_delta.partial_json` strings; parse once after `content_block_stop`.

antipattern.reason: `max_tokens` too low; truncation arrives with `stop_reason=max_tokens` and is treated as a JSON parse failure.
antipattern.note: Fix: Branch on `stop_reason==max_tokens` BEFORE `json.loads`; retry with higher budget.

antipattern.description: Vision call gives confusing answers; the model seems to ignore the image.
antipattern.reason: Text was placed before the image in the user content array.
antipattern.note: Fix: Reorder content so image / PDF parts come first; reissue.

antipattern.description: PDF call fails after several seconds with an opaque API error.
antipattern.reason: PDF exceeded 100 pages or 32MB; no preflight check.
antipattern.note: Fix: Inspect page count + size before encoding; split or downsample before sending.
